title: Governing body of district
doc_html:
§583.  Governing body of district

If a district is composed of territory wholly within one parish, the governing authority of that parish is the governing authority of the district.  If a district is composed of territory partly within two or more parishes, the governing authorities of those parishes in joint session constitute the governing authority of the district.
doc_text:
§583.  Governing body of district
If a district is composed of territory wholly within one parish, the governing authority of that parish is the governing authority of the district.  If a district is composed of territory partly within two or more parishes, the governing authorities of those parishes in joint session constitute the governing authority of the district.
